method.exception_policy: Only allowed if explicitly authorized by a future stage, file-count/size threshold is bounded, timeout budget is declared, checkpoint receipt is written before and after, and failure cannot block smaller validation fallback.
method.observed_failure: unzip -tqq and jar xf full recursive extraction timed out/stalled during FL17-MERGE-5 validation; user had to stop turn.
replacement_methods: selective extraction/read of required boot-critical files
method.scope: MetaBlooms full OS export/recovery validation in ChatGPT-style sandbox
